cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to figure out which of the given statements is sarcastic. Let me look at the two options again. Option A: "Are you implying history repeats itself if people ignore it? What an absurd claim" Option B: "Are you implying history repeats itself if people ignore it? What an insightful claim" First, I should understand what sarcasm is. Sarcasm is a form of verbal irony where someone says the opposite of what they really mean, often to mock or express contempt. It's usually said in a tone that indicates the speaker doesn't mean what
